Notes: First ascent of 19'-hexanoyloxyfucoxanthin. Followed the crux pitch. Led the first pitch, a dirty corner with a fair few branches and bushes, then up the dirt slope to the base of the clean face that makes the crux pitch.
First ascent of Prime Rib. Led the crux pitch. Abby fell on the traverse after breaking a foot, there's a little loose rock. Incredible natural line!

First ascent of The Medallion. Such a blast! Swam to the base with our gear in dry bags. Soloed up to the start, Walker pulled a big ol' rock out and fell into the water, but he was fine. What an awesome FA! Ephemeral though, I reckon it'll be under water in a few years.
